question:
[Previous Feedback] ADR file has correct naming and frontmatter.

Please write a Sprint 8 Week 2 goal statement document, Markdown format, saved to the day11/ directory. Include this week's OKRs, key milestones, and success criteria.

content.text:
[Wed 2026-03-18 11:11 EDT] [Previous Feedback] ADR file has correct naming and frontmatter.

Please write a Sprint 8 Week 2 goal statement document, Markdown format, saved to the day11/ directory. Include this week's OKRs, key milestones, and success criteria.

arguments.content:
---
created_at: 2026-03-30T09:45:00+08:00
author: metaclaw_agent
status: done
---

# Sprint 8 Week 2 Goal Statement

**Sprint:** Sprint 8 — Week 2  
**Period:** March 30 – April 3, 2026  
**Theme:** Documentation Organization & Technical Foundation  

---

## Weekly Objective

**Establish comprehensive, standardized documentation practices and complete all outstanding technical debt from Sprint 7 to ensure Sprint 8 development proceeds with clear guidelines and zero documentation blockers.**

---

## Key Results (OKRs)

### KR1: Documentation Standardization
- **Target:** 100% of new Markdown files follow the standardized frontmatter format
- **Target:** Publish documentation style guide v1.0 to team wiki
- **Current Baseline:** Inconsistent formats across existing docs
- **Owner:** Alex

### KR2: Sprint 7 Documentation Completion
- **Target:** Close all 5 outstanding Sprint 7 documentation action items
- **Target:** API v2.3.0 changelog published and internally reviewed
- **Target:** Payment integration patterns fully documented
- **Current Baseline:** 5 open action items (A1–A5)
- **Owner:** Team

### KR3: Automated Documentation Pipeline
- **Target:** Auto-generation pipeline operational for API reference docs
- **Target:** OpenAPI spec generates documentation with zero manual errors
- **Target:** Pipeline integrated into CI/CD for automatic updates
- **Current Baseline:** No automated pipeline exists
- **Owner:** Casey

### KR4: Security Audit Preparation
- **Target:** Schedule external security audit (Action A4 complete)
- **Target:** Compile initial security documentation package
- **Target:** Define audit scope and timeline with vendor
- **Current Baseline:** Audit not scheduled
- **Owner:** Alex

---

## Key Milestones

| Date | Milestone | Owner | Deliverable |
|------|-----------|-------|-------------|
| **Mon, Mar 30** | Documentation Standards Release | Alex | docs/style-guide-v1.md |
| **Tue, Mar 31** | API Changelog Draft | Taylor | day11/20260330_api_v2_3_0_changelog.md |
| **Wed, Apr 1** | Admin Dashboard Polish Complete | Sam | Dashboard v1.0.1 released |
| **Thu, Apr 2** | Documentation Audit Complete | Dana | Documentation audit report |
| **Fri, Apr 3** | Weekly Goals Complete | Team | All KR targets met or on track |

---

## Success Criteria

### Must Have (Non-Negotiable)
- [ ] All Markdown files in day11/ directory follow naming convention `YYYYMMDD_<desc>.md`
- [ ] All Markdown files include required YAML frontmatter (created_at, author, status)
- [ ] Action Item A1 (Admin Dashboard UX) — COMPLETED
- [ ] Action Item A2 (API v2.3.0 Changelog) — COMPLETED
- [ ] Action Item A4 (Security Audit Scheduled) — COMPLETED

### Should Have (High Priority)
- [ ] Action Item A3 (Auto-doc Pipeline) — OPERATIONAL
- [ ] Action Item A5 (Payment Patterns Doc) — COMPLETED
- [ ] Documentation style guide published to team wiki
- [ ] API v2.3.0 reference documentation reviewed and current

### Nice to Have (Stretch Goals)
- [ ] Notification system technical spec drafted
- [ ] User profile management API documentation complete
- [ ] 100% code coverage for documentation-related tests

---

## Team Assignments

| Team Member | Role | Week 2 Focus |
|-------------|------|--------------|
| **Alex** | Tech Lead | Documentation standards, security audit scheduling, API doc review |
| **Bai** | Backend Engineer | Notification system spec, user profile API docs |
| **Chen** | Frontend Engineer | Admin dashboard polish, mobile layout documentation |
| **Dana** | QA Engineer | Documentation audit, testing standards verification |
| **Casey** | DevOps Engineer | Auto-doc pipeline, CI/CD integration |
| **Jordan** | Backend Engineer | Payment patterns documentation |
| **Sam** | Full-Stack Engineer | Admin dashboard completion, UX improvements |
| **Taylor** | Frontend Engineer | API changelog, OpenAPI spec maintenance |

---

## Risks & Mitigations

| Risk | Impact | Likelihood | Mitigation |
|------|--------|------------|------------|
| Auto-doc pipeline delays development work | High | Low | Casey has dedicated Tuesday–Wednesday for pipeline; rollback to manual docs if needed |
| Security audit vendor scheduling conflicts | Medium | Medium | Alex to contact 3 vendors simultaneously; have backup dates ready |
| Team underestimates documentation effort | Medium | Medium | Daily standups to surface blockers; Dana to audit progress Wednesday |
| Sprint 8 dev work blocked by docs | High | Low | Prioritize "Must Have" docs first; defer "Nice to Have" items if needed |

---

## Dependencies

- **Casey's pipeline work** depends on: OpenAPI spec finalized by Taylor
- **Security audit scheduling** depends on: Budget approval from PM (tracked separately)
- **Admin dashboard completion** depends on: UX feedback from stakeholder review

---

## Weekly Rhythm

| Day | Activity | Time | Participants |
|-----|----------|------|--------------|
| Monday | Kickoff + Standards Review | 10:00 AM | All |
| Tuesday–Thursday | Async standups | 9:00 AM | All (Slack) |
| Wednesday | Mid-week Check-in | 3:00 PM | Alex, Dana |
| Friday | Documentation Sprint | 2:00 PM – 5:00 PM | All |
| Friday | Week 2 Retrospective | 4:00 PM | All |

---

## Reporting

**Daily Updates:** Posted in #sprint-8-updates channel by 5:00 PM  
**Weekly Summary:** Formal report to PM by EOD Friday, April 3  
**Blockers:** Escalated immediately to Alex via Slack @mention

---

*Statement prepared: March 30, 2026*  
*Reviewed by: Backend Engineering Team*  
*Next Review: April 3, 2026 (Week 2 Retrospective)*
